title: T-012 — esign_modal primitive (UI cross-cut, prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-012 — esign_modal primitive (UI cross-cut)

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §5.3 signature flow, §13.2 PIN re-verify, §8.5 row 'E-Signature primitive'
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build the shared `EsignBlock` Next.js client component (Dialog) that handles PIN re-verification + signature_meaning selection, returning a short-lived `pin_proof` token to the parent for sign-time submission. This is reused by hold release, spec approval, NCR close, CCP signoff.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/components/quality/EsignBlock.tsx` — shadcn Dialog with masked PIN input, signature_meaning dropdown (approved/released/rejected/witnessed/counter_signed), and submit button.
2. On submit calls Server Action `verifyPin(pin)` returning `pin_proof` (HMAC token TTL 60s); never computes hash on client.
3. Parent passes `record_id`, `record_type`, `meaning`; child returns pin_proof on success.
4. 1:1 prototype parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:597-634` (esign_modal).

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/quality/EsignBlock.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/verifyPin.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/__tests__/EsignBlock.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the EsignBlock dialog renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:597-634, then the production dialog matches the prototype in structural parity (header + PIN input + meaning dropdown + 2 footer buttons in same order), visual parity (shadcn Dialog + Input type=password + Select + Button primitives, no native HTML select), and interaction parity (Submit disabled while PIN length<4 and during in-flight request) — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given verifyPin(pin) is called server-side with the user's stored PIN hash, when the PIN matches, then it returns a pin_proof HMAC with TTL exp=now+60s; when it mismatches, returns 401 PIN_INVALID and emits audit auth.pin_failed
3. Given the dialog completes, when onSuccess fires, then the parent receives {pin_proof, signature_meaning} only — the dialog never receives or displays a signature hash

## Parity checklist (1:1 with prototype)
- Dialog header titled 'Electronic Signature' (i18n key qa.esign.title)
- PIN field uses masked Input (type=password) with label key qa.esign.pin_label
- Signature meaning Select with 5 options (approved/released/rejected/witnessed/counter_signed)
- Footer: Cancel button (variant=ghost) on left, Sign button (variant=primary) on right; same order as prototype
- Submit disabled until PIN min 4 digits
- Loading spinner inside Sign button during in-flight (no client-side hash computation)
- Same shadcn primitives Dialog/Input/Select/Button (no native HTML select)
- Same shadcn spacing tokens (space-y-4 between fields)

pipeline_inputs.description: EsignBlock shadcn Dialog primitive + verifyPin Server Action (HMAC pin_proof TTL 60s) reused by hold/spec/NCR/CCP sign flows.
pipeline_inputs.details: Build shadcn Dialog component matching design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:597-634 (esign_modal) with structural, visual, and interaction parity per the parity checklist embedded in the prompt: header 'Electronic Signature', masked Input type=password for PIN, Select with 5 signature meanings, Cancel(ghost)/Sign(primary) buttons in that order, submit disabled until PIN>=4 chars, loading spinner during request. Server Action verifyPin checks PBKDF2 against user.pin_hash and returns HMAC pin_proof TTL=60s on success. Component never sees the signature_hash; parent submits pin_proof to its sign endpoint where the server computes the hash. Translation notes from prototype-index-quality.json esign_modal entry must be honored (no native select, server-side hash, PIN HMAC TTL).
out_of_scope: Do not implement the hash-computation server action (lives in each consumer task: T-007/T-019/T-039/T-046)
Do not implement PIN rotation policy (out of scope; 02-SETTINGS §14)
Do not embed virtual keypad (BL-QA-06 deferred per prototype known_bugs)
acceptance_criteria: Given the EsignBlock renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:597-634, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (header + PIN input + meaning Select + 2 footer buttons in same order), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Input/Select/Button only, no native select), and interaction (Submit disabled until PIN>=4 chars and during in-flight) — verified by RTL snapshot test plus the parity checklist embedded in pipeline_inputs.details

Given verifyPin(pin) runs server-side, when PIN matches the user's stored hash, then it returns an HMAC pin_proof with exp=now+60s; when mismatch, returns 401 PIN_INVALID and emits audit auth.pin_failed
Given the dialog completes successfully, when onSuccess fires, then the parent receives only {pin_proof, signature_meaning} and never a signature_hash
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/__tests__/EsignBlock.test.tsx with RTL snapshot test that fails before implementation, plus an integration test for verifyPin success/failure
risk_red_lines: Do not compute signature hash on the client
Do not log raw PIN values in any path
Do not drift to native HTML <select> per prototype translation notes
